allow: Bash(rm -f pages/Ecommerce.tsx pages/ProductDetails.tsx pages/Cart.tsx pages/Success.tsx pages/Admin/Products.tsx pages/Admin/Orders.tsx pages/Admin/OrderDetailsModal.tsx components/CartDrawer.tsx components/SearchBar.tsx components/SortDropdown.tsx context/CartProvider.tsx queries/productQueries.ts)
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { Client, Environment } from 'square'; console.log\('v1 API available: Client =', typeof Client, ', Environment =', typeof Environment\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:', p.version, '\\nexports keys:', Object.keys\(p.exports||{}\).slice\(0,5\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); console.log\('Zod version check - z.string\(\) ok:', typeof z.string\(\) !== 'undefined'\); const s = z.object\({name: z.string\(\)}\); console.log\('z.object ok'\); const r = s.safeParse\({name: 'test'}\); console.log\('safeParse ok:', r.success\);")

Bash(node -e "const zod = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); console.log\('ZodType:', typeof zod.ZodType\); console.log\('z.ZodType:', typeof zod.z?.ZodType\); console.log\('Has ZodString:', typeof zod.z?.string\); console.log\('z keys:', Object.keys\(zod.z || {}\).slice\(0,20\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); console.log\('string:', typeof z.string\(\)\); console.log\('enum:', typeof z.enum\(['a']\)\); console.log\('literal:', typeof z.literal\('x'\)\); console.log\('refine works:', z.string\(\).refine\(s => s.length > 0\) ? 'yes' : 'no'\); console.log\('ZodIssueCode:', typeof z.ZodIssueCode\);")
